description:
A̴̢̱̜͓͑̌́͝ ̵̰̤̦̹̀́͌͐̏m̷̘̻̹̯̽̈́̍o̸̩̘̮͒͊̒͠n̵̯̽̄̌̕š̵̀ͅt̸͙̯͖̜̗̉̓̔̚è̸̹̦̗͋̒̕ŗ̸̨̬͇̖͗̐̉̀͂ ̴̘̪͗ẅ̸͆́̾͝ͅã̶̡̲̾̊̋̐ñ̸̘̼͎̈́̏̈́ͅd̷̞̍̉͋̋ẽ̸͖͚̍͆r̵̟̥̗̠̅í̶̡͙̥̞͐̄̑n̷̛̛͎̼͐̿̿g̵̢͓̲̙̐͗̉ ̸̬͚̜̈́͂̓ą̴̲̤̱̌r̶̫̙̙̱͝ͅȯ̸̬̏͌ü̶̧̡̩̖̑͂̕̕n̵̓͛͊͘͝ͅd̸̥̔ ̴͇̘́̾̍̎̋o̸͇̝̚ņ̴̯̯͓͒ ̴̮̗̘̅̔͆͂̅C̶͖͉̭̠̊̈́̚̚h̴͈̪͝ȑ̴͖̖͙̻̾̎̀͋i̷̧̞̞͝s̷̥͋t̸̢̰̗̾̓͒͝m̴͋͝ͅå̴̢͚̻̲̏͐̑s̷̱̀ ̵̧̭̩̬̗͗È̶̱͖̚v̵̪͚͗̐͊̓̚e̷͚͕͇̱̓͊

A little note:

Didn't wanna miss out on making a Christmas bot

so

I got help from a friend with the condition of making it horror lol

Also red lines up pretty well for Horror🤷‍♀️

I tried my best to make the bot see her as innocent... the bot kept trying to state her intentions bruhhhhh

So I just decided to FULL SEND it cause why not

Warning: Dead Dove Tag is there for a reason!

I didn't really like the sad expression on the picture cause it felt like I had to make it somehow angst, so I tried a 'different' method

uhh

Have fun

I don't really know if Persona Suggestions are needed but here we go:

Police Officer, idk

Random Person(no inherent Identity)

Neighbor

Another escapee experiment

Story Mode(Your OC is not directly involved)

How does story mode work? You are interacting with the narrative instead of the roleplay

Examples:

*Somebody notices her and approaches* (specify more, the bot can assume it's your OC lol)

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

-- -- --

Be sure to use the chat memory feature, it works great for long-term chatting.

Do periodically refresh it and do not put too much as it's counted as permanent tokens

First Message Suggestion:
creator: NotHorny
